review: Polka Deli is just one of many reasons I love living in Port Richmond. The Polish influence is real on the mean streets of the Port and it's because of fabulous places like Polka Deli. While most of their clientele seems to be Polish natives, they are very kind and hospitable to us English speaking third generationers. The lovely man behind the counter took his time with me to match me up with my kielbasa soulmate. Little known fact-Donna's bar gets their kielbasa from Polka! While the Swiaki's and Czerw's of the world get all the love and name recognition (deservedly so-they also kick ass) Polka has an equally delicious product without the hype. I wish they had fresh pierogi for sale but the frozen line they carry was pretty good. I got other delicious items from the deli including bacon, sauerkraut ,and my fave kabanosa. There's also an excellent selection of canned or jarred goods, baked goods, and candy from the Motherland. Anyone looking to do a comprehensive tour of little Poland in the city should add Polka Deli to their list!
